meta.title: TripIt Alternative: Free Group Trip Planner (2026) | WePlanify
meta.description: Looking for a TripIt alternative built for group travel? WePlanify adds real-time collaboration, shared polls, group budgets and itineraries — free, bilingual (EN/FR).

heroIntro: TripIt and WePlanify both help you plan trips, but they solve very different problems. TripIt organizes booking confirmations into a personal itinerary. WePlanify is built from the ground up for group collaboration. Here is how they compare.
verdict: TripIt focuses on organizing travel confirmations and personal itineraries. WePlanify is built for group collaboration — polls, shared budgets, and planning together. TripIt is solo-first, WePlanify is group-first.

rows.label: Available in 8 languages (EN, FR, ES, IT, DE, PT, PL, ZH)

tripitShinesPoints.title: Automatic booking import
tripitShinesPoints.desc: Forward your confirmation emails and TripIt builds your itinerary automatically. Flights, hotels, car rentals — organized in one timeline.

tripitShinesPoints.title: Flight and airport alerts
tripitShinesPoints.desc: TripIt Pro sends gate changes, delay notifications, and alternative flight suggestions. Useful for frequent flyers who need real-time updates.

tripitShinesPoints.title: Mobile app with offline access
tripitShinesPoints.desc: TripIt offers a native mobile app with offline access to your itinerary, which can be useful when traveling internationally without data.

weplanifyWinsPoints.title: Real group collaboration
weplanifyWinsPoints.desc: Everyone in the group can add destinations, suggest activities, and edit the itinerary in real time. TripIt only lets you share a read-only view.

weplanifyWinsPoints.title: Polls and voting
weplanifyWinsPoints.desc: Can not decide between Barcelona and Lisbon? Create a poll and let the group vote. TripIt has no voting feature.

weplanifyWinsPoints.title: Shared budget tracker
weplanifyWinsPoints.desc: Track group expenses, split costs, and keep everyone on the same page financially. TripIt does not track budgets.

weplanifyWinsPoints.title: Activity discovery
weplanifyWinsPoints.desc: Browse and add activities, restaurants, and experiences directly inside WePlanify. TripIt focuses on logistics, not discovery.

weplanifyWinsPoints.title: Free and bilingual
weplanifyWinsPoints.desc: WePlanify is completely free and available in both English and French. TripIt charges $49/year for its most useful features.

whoTripit: Choose TripIt if you are a solo business traveler who wants to automatically organize flight confirmations, get gate-change alerts, and keep a personal itinerary with offline access.
whoWeplanify: Choose WePlanify if you are planning a trip with friends or family and need everyone to collaborate on the itinerary, vote on destinations, and track shared expenses — all for free.

faqs.q: Why switch from TripIt to WePlanify?
faqs.a: TripIt is designed for individual travelers managing bookings. It does not support group polls, shared budgets, collaborative packing lists, or real-time group editing. If you are planning with others, WePlanify provides all the coordination tools TripIt lacks — completely free.

faqs.q: What does TripIt lack for group trips?
faqs.a: TripIt does not offer group voting, shared expense tracking, collaborative itinerary editing, packing lists, or activity discovery. Its sharing is limited to read-only views. WePlanify is built entirely around group collaboration.

Yes. All core features — collaborative itinerary, polls, budget tracker, packing lists, and activity discovery — are free with no trial limits or hidden paywalls. TripIt charges $49/year for its most useful features like flight alerts.

ctaTitle: Ready to plan your next group trip?
